title: Module doc missing port ≤ 32767 constraint for TCP server address
description: The module-level doc says 'Format: host:port for TCP (e.g. 127.0.0.1:8080) or /path for UDS' without mentioning the port ≤ 32767 limit. A user who sets WOLFHSM_SERVER=host:40000 gets an InvalidUri error from get() with a clear message, but nothing in the doc warned them. Fix: add '(port must be ≤ 32767; wolfhsm C transport uses i16)' to the server address format description.
